_comment_1: Copy this file to ~/.pi/agent/slack-mcp.json (NOT stowed; per-machine secrets).
_comment_2: Use one of the auth methods below. Priority: XOXP > XOXB > XOXC+XOXD.
_comment_timeout: Per-tool-call timeout (ms, default 60000). Raise globally and/or per upstream tool for slow calls like conversations_unreads over many channels.
_comment_postprocess: CSV output cleanup (default on). Drops wide rarely-used columns, truncates long Text (maxTextLength, 0=off), and resolves <@U...> mentions to names. Dropping Cursor preserves pagination via a 'next_cursor:' footer. Set "postProcess": false for fully raw output, or omit a column from dropColumns to keep it (e.g. Permalink). Per-call escape hatch: conversations_history/replies/search_messages accept tool args _maxTextLength (override truncation for one call; 0=none) and _raw (true=fully raw for one call).
